segments.caption: The video opens with a white screen, then transitions to a man and a woman standing side-by-side against a plain white background. The man, wearing a navy blue button-up shirt with rolled sleeves and dark trousers with a red AC/DC belt buckle, stands with his hands clasped. The woman, in a black short-sleeved dress, gestures expressively as she speaks. They appear to be introducing a topic, likely educational, as the scene cuts to a colorful animated sequence featuring a lemonade stand, a bank, and various economic facts displayed in speech bubbles. The animation includes a 'CRASH COURSE' title card with a lemon and graph elements, suggesting an economics theme. The video then returns to the man, now alone, speaking directly to the camera with a lamp and a podium visible beside him. A stylized graphic of a man with a green face and purple background appears briefly. The scene shifts again to the woman, now seated at a dark wooden desk with a lamp, potted plants, a red cash register, and books behind her. She speaks with hand gestures, and a graphic of a mortgage document appears briefly on screen, reinforcing the financial theme. The overall tone is informative and engaging, blending live-action presentation with animated visuals to explain economic concepts.

segments.caption: The segment begins with the Woman in Black Dress standing in front of a clean, bright background, speaking directly to the camera. She wears a black short-sleeved dress and has a small microphone clipped to her neckline. Behind her, a red cash register, a potted plant, and a small globe are visible on a dark wooden desk, contributing to a scholarly office environment. As she speaks, her expressions are animated and her hands gesture to emphasize points. At one point, a green definition box appears on screen, defining 'DEFAULT' as 'When a debtor is unable to meet the legal obligation of debt repayment,' accompanied by a small cartoon character. The scene transitions to a teal background with white text explaining that traditionally, it was hard to get a mortgage with bad credit or an unstable job, as lenders feared default. The video then returns to the Woman in Black Dress, now with a wider view showing more of the desk setup, including stacked books labeled 'Economics' and a white bust. She continues speaking with expressive hand movements. The segment concludes with an aerial shot of a suburban neighborhood under construction, showing multiple houses in various stages of framing, with roads and vehicles visible, suggesting a real-world application of mortgage lending and housing development.

segments.caption: The video opens with an aerial construction view of a suburban neighborhood under development, showing multiple houses in various stages of framing, roads, and vehicles, illustrating housing development. The scene transitions to a close-up of a U.S. dollar bill, focusing on the 'SERIES' text and intricate security patterns, symbolizing financial systems. The video then cuts to the Woman in Black Dress, standing in front of a desk setup with a red cash register, potted plants, a globe, and books labeled 'Economics'. She speaks expressively, using hand gestures to emphasize her points. A Definition Box appears on screen, defining 'SECURITIZE' as 'The process of taking an illiquid asset and transforming it into a security', accompanied by a small cartoon character. As she continues speaking, a graphic of a house with a bird flying above it appears on the right side of the screen, reinforcing the theme of housing and finance. The lighting remains bright and even, maintaining a professional and educational atmosphere throughout the segment.

segments.caption: The video opens with the Woman in Black Dress standing in front of a scholarly desk setup, speaking expressively with hand gestures. The desk features a red cash register, potted plants, a globe, a white bust, and books labeled 'Economics'. A graphic of a house appears on the right side of the screen, reinforcing the theme of housing. The scene transitions to a close-up of computer screens displaying financial websites for Moody’s, Fitch, and Standard & Poor’s, emphasizing credit rating agencies. A purple text overlay appears, stating that these agencies gave mortgage-backed securities AAA ratings, which were considered the best, and notes that mortgage debt was once a good investment when only given to borrowers with good credit. The video returns to the Woman in Black Dress, who continues her explanation, now with a green definition box appearing on the left side of the screen defining 'SUBPRIME MORTGAGE' as 'A loan granted to individuals with poor credit histories'. The scene shifts again to an aerial view of a suburban neighborhood with uniform houses and streets, illustrating the housing market. Back to the Woman in Black Dress, a teal graphic on the right side of the screen highlights 'PREDATORY LENDING PRACTICES' in bold yellow text, as she continues to speak with expressive hand movements. The lamp is visible to her left, and the desk setup remains consistent throughout her segments.

segments.caption: The video opens with the Woman in Black Dress standing in front of a scholarly desk setup, speaking directly to the camera with expressive hand gestures. She is wearing a black short-sleeved dress with a microphone clipped to her neckline, and behind her is a dark wooden desk featuring a red cash register, potted plants, a small globe, a white bust, and stacked books labeled 'Economics'. As she speaks, a teal graphic overlay appears on the right side of the screen with bold yellow text reading 'COLLATERALIZED DEBT OBLIGATIONS'. The scene then transitions to a series of real-world shots: a row of suburban houses under a dark, stormy sky, followed by a 'SOLD' sign in front of a house, and then a 'BANK OWNED' sign, symbolizing the housing market’s shift. A text overlay on a coral background explains that lax lending requirements and low interest rates drove housing prices higher, making mortgage-backed securities and CDOs seem like better investments. The video then shifts to an animated sequence with a teal background, where houses float inside bubbles, and a woman character is shown climbing a rope attached to one of the bubbles, illustrating the rising housing market and the risks involved. The animation visually represents the housing bubble and its eventual instability.

segments.caption: The video begins with the Animated Housing Bubble Scene, showing a woman character climbing a rope attached to a bubble containing a house, surrounded by other floating house bubbles against a teal background, symbolizing the rising housing market. The scene transitions to a suburban landscape with multiple houses, each marked with 'For Sale' signs, indicating a booming real estate market. A family of three stands in front of a house, which then displays a price tag of $725,000, emphasizing affordability and demand. A large truck labeled 'Mortgage Backed Securities' drives past, visually linking the housing market to financial instruments. The narrative shifts to a blue background with text explaining that big financial institutions stopped buying subprime mortgages, causing lenders to be stuck with bad loans and leading to bankruptcies by 2007. This is followed by an animated factory labeled 'Mortgage Backed Securities & CDOs', where a worker in a hard hat pushes a wheelbarrow of money into a machine, symbolizing the creation of complex financial products. The scene then moves to the Bank of Schneebly Animation, where customers wait in line, and a banker reviews a file labeled 'CREDIT' with a glowing effect, highlighting the credit evaluation process. The final scene shows a meeting in an office with three individuals at a desk, one gesturing while discussing documents, with a calendar marked 'OCTOBER' and a clock indicating time pressure, suggesting financial decision-making under stress.

segments.caption: The video begins with an animated office scene labeled 'Bank of Schneebly,' where three characters sit at a desk: a woman with red hair in a blue shirt, a man in a white shirt and tie, and a man in a navy suit. A glowing text 'CREDIT DEFAULT SWAPS' appears above the desk, suggesting a financial discussion. The scene transitions to a 3D animation of the AIG logo, which shatters and reforms into a wireframe outline, symbolizing instability. This is followed by a text overlay on an orange background explaining that credit default swaps were turned into securities allowing traders to bet on mortgage values. The visual then shifts to a spiderweb graphic with labels like 'RISK,' 'LIABILITY,' and 'ASSET' radiating outward, emphasizing interconnected financial risks. The web’s lines turn red, indicating escalating danger. The scene cuts to a real-world shot of a New York storefront with 'NEW YORK' signage, then to a purple background with text stating that no one knew how bad financial institutions' balance sheets were due to complicated, unregulated assets. The overall narrative traces the complexity and hidden risks of financial instruments leading to systemic uncertainty.

active_entities.Bank of Schneebly Animation: Animated office scene with three characters at a desk, a calendar marked 'OCTOBER,' a clock, and a glowing 'CREDIT DEFAULT SWAPS' text above the desk, indicating a financial discussion.
active_entities.Text Overlay: White text on an orange background explaining that credit default swaps were turned into securities allowing traders to bet on mortgage values, with key words like 'HUGE AMOUNTS OF MONEY' highlighted in purple.

discovered_new_entities.New York Storefront: Real-world shot of a storefront with 'NEW YORK' in large metallic letters above the entrance, reflecting a city environment and possibly symbolizing the financial hub of the crisis.

segments.caption: The video opens with an aerial view of the bustling New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) trading floor, filled with traders moving between trading posts adorned with multiple monitors and NYSE signage, capturing the high-energy environment of financial markets. The scene transitions to the Man in Navy Blue Shirt, who stands in a minimalist white studio with a podium and lamp beside him, speaking directly to the camera with expressive hand gestures. The video then cuts to a close-up of a man with a gray beard and suit, resting his head on his hand in a contemplative or weary pose, likely a financial official or policymaker. The Man in Navy Blue Shirt reappears, now with a graphic overlay on the right side of the screen reading 'TARP' and 'TROUBLED ASSETS RELIEF PROGRAM' in bold yellow and white text on a teal background, followed by 'BANK BAILOUT' in white. The scene shifts to a side-profile shot of the bearded man and a woman seated beside him, both appearing serious and focused, possibly during a hearing or meeting. A brief shot of the General Motors building exterior is shown, followed by a top-down view of a trader at a desk, surrounded by papers and a computer screen displaying financial data, with a volunteer in a blue shirt assisting. The Man in Navy Blue Shirt returns, continuing his explanation with animated gestures. The final shot features a man in a suit and glasses speaking at a podium with the United States Department of the Treasury seal, set against a grand, ornate ceiling, suggesting a formal government address. The video uses a mix of real-world footage, studio segments, and graphic overlays to narrate the financial crisis and government response, particularly focusing on TARP and institutional reactions.

segments.caption: The video opens with a close-up of a yellow school bus window, showing a man with glasses inside, with the words 'HEAD START' visible on the side, suggesting a government-funded program. The scene transitions to a construction sign reading 'PUTTING AMERICA TO WORK' and 'PROJECT FUNDED BY THE American Recovery and Reinvestment Act,' indicating federal economic stimulus efforts. The video then cuts to the Woman in Black Dress seated at a dark wooden Desk Setup, speaking directly to the camera with expressive hand gestures. A teal graphic labeled 'DODD-FRANK LAW' appears on the left, while behind her are books, a red cash register, a small white bust, and a potted plant. The camera zooms in on her face as she continues speaking, emphasizing her points with hand movements. The scene shifts to the Man in Navy Blue Shirt, standing in a white studio with a Podium and a Lamp beside him, also speaking with animated gestures. A green Definition Box appears, defining 'PERVERSE INCENTIVE' as 'When a policy ends up having a negative effect, opposite of what is intended.' The video then cuts to an exterior shot of a white sign reading 'Countrywide 4500 PARK GRANADA,' with green foliage in the background, before returning to the Man in Navy Blue Shirt, who now has a new Definition Box defining 'MORAL HAZARD' as 'When one person takes on more risk because someone else bears the burden of that risk.'

segments.caption: The video opens with the Man in Navy Blue Shirt standing in a white studio, speaking directly to the camera with expressive hand gestures. A tall black lamp is visible beside him, and a dark wooden podium is partially in view. He introduces the topic with a graphic overlay that reads 'TOO BIG TO FAIL' in bold white text on a yellow diamond, set against a teal striped background. The scene transitions to a stylized animated portrait of Alan Greenspan, labeled 'Fig 12.1 ALAN GREENSPAN,' with exaggerated features and a green tie, set against a teal backdrop. A yellow text box reads '$ FUNNY MONEY $ Alan’s green spans the gamut.' The video then cuts to the Woman in Black Dress, seated at a dark wooden desk in a scholarly office environment. Behind her are a red cash register, potted plants, a small white bust, and stacked books labeled 'Economics.' She speaks with animated hand gestures, and the camera zooms in slightly on her face. A green text overlay appears with a quote: 'THE Sentries WERE NOT AT THEIR POSTS, IN NO SMALL PART DUE TO THE WIDELY ACCEPTED FAITH IN THE SELF-CORRECTING NATURE OF THE MARKETS, AND THE ABILITY OF FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS TO EFFECTIVELY POLICE THEMSELVES.' The quote highlights key phrases in green, emphasizing the theme of market overconfidence. The woman continues speaking, maintaining eye contact with the camera, as the scene remains focused on her and the desk setup.

segments.caption: The video opens with the Woman in Black Dress speaking directly to the camera in a studio setting, with a red cash register, potted plants, and a small white bust visible behind her on a dark wooden desk. She gestures expressively as she speaks, maintaining eye contact with the audience. The scene transitions with a colorful diagonal striped graphic overlay, then cuts to a real-world shot of several men in business attire walking into a modern glass building, suggesting a corporate or financial environment. The next scene shifts to a bustling trading floor, where traders in blue shirts are intensely focused on multiple computer monitors, one seated and another standing, both engaged with keyboards and screens displaying financial data. The video then cuts to a close-up of a blue 'auction.com FORECLOSURE PUBLIC HOME AUCTION' sign attached to a chain-link fence in front of a house, indicating a real estate foreclosure. The scene returns to the Woman in Black Dress, who continues her explanation with hand gestures, emphasizing points as she speaks. The video concludes with a credits sequence where she points to the right side of the screen, where the 'CRASH COURSE' title and production credits appear in black text on a white background, listing roles such as hosts, writers, and crew members.

active_entities.General Motors Building: Exterior shot of a modern building with 'GENERAL MOTORS' in large letters above the entrance, featuring glass walls and cars in the foreground, symbolizing corporate financial distress.
active_entities.Trader at Desk: A man in a suit at a trading desk, viewed from above, surrounded by papers, a computer screen with financial data, and a volunteer in a blue shirt with 'VOLUNTEER' written on the sleeve, assisting with documents.
active_entities.Man at Treasury Podium: A man in a suit and glasses speaking at a podium with the United States Department of the Treasury seal, set against a grand, ornate ceiling with a circular skylight, suggesting a formal government address.
active_entities.Countrywide Sign: White sign with gold lettering reading 'Countrywide 4500 PARK GRANADA,' set against green foliage, indicating a real-world location related to the financial narrative.
active_entities.Head Start Bus: Yellow school bus with 'HEAD START' written in bold black letters on the side; a man with glasses is visible through the window, suggesting a government-funded early childhood education program.
active_entities.American Recovery and Reinvestment Act S: Green and orange construction sign with text 'PUTTING AMERICA TO WORK' and 'PROJECT FUNDED BY THE American Recovery and Reinvestment Act,' featuring a worker icon and USDOT logo, indicating federal infrastructure funding.
active_entities.Alan Greenspan Animation: Stylized animated portrait of Alan Greenspan with exaggerated features, green hair, and a green tie, set against a teal background; labeled 'Fig 12.1 ALAN GREENSPAN' with a yellow text box reading '$ FUNNY MONEY $ Alan’s green spans the gamut.'
active_entities.Quote Text Overlay: Green background with white text displaying the quote: 'THE Sentries WERE NOT AT THEIR POSTS, IN NO SMALL PART DUE TO THE WIDELY ACCEPTED FAITH IN THE SELF-CORRECTING NATURE OF THE MARKETS, AND THE ABILITY OF FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS TO EFFECTIVELY POLICE THEMSELVES,' with key phrases highlighted in green.

discovered_new_entities.Businessmen Entering Building: Several men in business attire, including suits and dress shirts, walking into a modern glass building; one holds a coffee cup, another wears headphones, and they carry bags, suggesting a professional or financial setting.
discovered_new_entities.Trading Floor Scene: A dimly lit, crowded trading floor with multiple traders in blue shirts working at desks filled with computer monitors, keyboards, and communication equipment; one trader is seated and appears contemplative, while another stands and types, indicating high-pressure financial activity.
discovered_new_entities.Foreclosure Sign: A blue and white 'auction.com FORECLOSURE PUBLIC HOME AUCTION' sign attached to a chain-link fence in front of a house, with details for an open house and auction date, symbolizing real estate distress.
discovered_new_entities.Credits Sequence: White background with black text listing production roles such as 'HOSTS', 'DIRECTOR', 'WRITERS', and 'PRODUCTION ASSOCIATE', with the Woman in Black Dress pointing to the text as it appears, indicating the end of the segment.

segments.caption: The video segment begins with the Woman in Black Dress standing against a plain white background, speaking directly to the camera with expressive hand gestures. On the right side of the screen, black text appears sequentially, listing the 'THOUGHT CAFÉ CREATIVE TEAM' with names such as Stephanie Bailis, Cody Brown, and others. The text then transitions to 'IMAGES AND FOOTAGE' sources including Thinkstock, Wikimedia Commons, US Library of Congress, Pond 5, and Videoblocks. Next, 'SPECIAL THANKS' are given to YouTube Space Los Angeles, Mahin Ibrahim, and Andrew Fillmore, followed by social media handles under 'FOLLOW US!' including @THECRASHCOURSE, @ACDLEADERSHIP, @ADRIENEHILL, @CRASHCOURSESTAN, and @BRANDONBRUNGARD. The scene then transitions to a vibrant, animated end screen with a teal grid background. At the top center, the 'CRASH COURSE' logo is displayed with a lemon and graph lines, flanked by two animated characters. On the left, a thumbnail labeled 'LAST EPISODE' shows 'MONEY AND FINANCE' with cartoon characters and a lemonade bottle. On the right, a 'NEXT EPISODE' thumbnail titled 'ECONOMIC CRASHES' features two characters holding money over a burning pile. Below, a large orange 'SUBSCRIBE' button is accompanied by a smiling lemonade bottle character. Additional elements include a 'Patreon' logo in the bottom left, a 'HEY! GO CHECK OUT CRASH COURSE KIDS!' bubble in the top right with a green slime character, and a 'GRAPHICS CREATED BY: Thought Café' tag in the bottom right. The overall atmosphere is bright, engaging, and designed to encourage viewer interaction and channel engagement.

active_entities.Woman in Black Dress: Wearing a black short-sleeved dress with a microphone clipped to her neckline; standing against a plain white background, speaking directly to the camera with expressive hand gestures, transitioning from acknowledging the creative team to the end screen.

discovered_new_entities.End Screen Graphics: Vibrant animated layout with a teal grid background, featuring the 'CRASH COURSE' logo, 'LAST EPISODE' and 'NEXT EPISODE' thumbnails, a 'SUBSCRIBE' button, a 'Patreon' logo, a 'CRASH COURSE KIDS' bubble, and a 'GRAPHICS CREATED BY: Thought Café' tag, all designed to promote viewer engagement and channel content.

entity_library.Man in Navy Blue Shirt: Wearing a navy blue button-up shirt with rolled sleeves; stands in a white studio with a dark wooden podium and a tall black lamp beside him; speaks directly to the camera with expressive hand gestures.
entity_library.Woman in Black Dress: Wearing a black short-sleeved dress with a microphone clipped to her neckline; standing against a plain white background, speaking directly to the camera with expressive hand gestures, transitioning from acknowledging the creative team to the end screen.
entity_library.Animated Lemonade Stand Scene: Colorful cartoon depiction of a suburban lemonade stand with children, a yellow inflatable tube man, and text overlays about business and economics.
entity_library.Bank of Schneebly Animation: Animated office scene with three characters at a desk, a calendar marked 'OCTOBER,' a clock, and a glowing 'CREDIT DEFAULT SWAPS' text above the desk, indicating a financial discussion.
entity_library.CRASH COURSE Title Card: Stylized green banner with 'CRASH COURSE' text, featuring a lemon, graph lines, and small animated characters, set against a teal grid background.
entity_library.Mortgage Document Graphic: Briefly displayed graphic showing a document labeled 'Mortgage' with a red stamp, appearing during the woman's seated segment.
entity_library.Desk Setup: Dark wooden desk featuring a red cash register, potted plants, a small globe, a white bust, and stacked books labeled 'Economics', creating a scholarly office environment.
entity_library.Lamp: Tall black floor lamp with a beige shade, visible beside the Man in Navy Blue Shirt during his studio segments.
entity_library.Podium: Dark wooden podium with a white rope, visible beside the Man in Navy Blue Shirt during his studio segments.
entity_library.Definition Box: Green graphic overlay with white text defining 'PERVERSE INCENTIVE' and later 'MORAL HAZARD', each accompanied by a small cartoon character.
entity_library.Text Overlay: White text on an orange background explaining that credit default swaps were turned into securities allowing traders to bet on mortgage values, with key words like 'HUGE AMOUNTS OF MONEY' highlighted in purple.
entity_library.Aerial Construction View: Overhead drone shot of a suburban neighborhood with uniform houses, streets, and swimming pools, illustrating the housing market.
entity_library.Dollar Bill Close-Up: Close-up of a U.S. dollar bill focusing on the 'SERIES' text and intricate security patterns, symbolizing financial systems.
entity_library.House Graphic: Animated graphic of a house with a bird flying above it, appearing on the right side of the screen to reinforce the theme of housing and finance.
entity_library.Predatory Lending Practices Graphic: Teal graphic on the right side of the screen with bold yellow text reading 'PREDATORY LENDING PRACTICES', appearing during the woman's explanation.
entity_library.Collateralized Debt Obligations Graphic: Teal diamond-shaped graphic with bold yellow text reading 'COLLATERALIZED DEBT OBLIGATIONS', appearing on the right side of the screen during the woman's explanation.
entity_library.Housing Market Transition Sequence: A series of real-world shots showing suburban houses under a stormy sky, a 'SOLD' sign, and a 'BANK OWNED' sign, symbolizing the rise and fall of the housing market.
entity_library.Animated Housing Bubble Scene: Teal background with houses floating inside bubbles, and a woman character climbing a rope attached to one bubble, visually representing the housing bubble and its risks.
entity_library.Mortgage Backed Securities Truck: Large blue truck with 'Mortgage Backed Securities' written on its side, driving past a suburban house, symbolizing the financial packaging of mortgages.
entity_library.Factory Animation: Animated industrial factory labeled 'Mortgage Backed Securities & CDOs', with a worker in a hard hat pushing a wheelbarrow of money into a machine, representing the creation of financial derivatives.
entity_library.Office Meeting Scene: Three individuals seated at a desk in an office, one gesturing while discussing documents, with a calendar marked 'OCTOBER' and a clock indicating time pressure, suggesting financial decision-making under stress.
entity_library.AIG Logo Animation: 3D animated AIG logo that shatters and reforms into a wireframe outline, symbolizing financial instability and structural fragility.
entity_library.Spiderweb Graphic: Orange background with a white spiderweb radiating labels such as 'RISK,' 'LIABILITY,' and 'ASSET'; lines turn red to indicate escalating financial danger.
entity_library.Text Overlay (Purple Background): Purple background with white text stating that no one knew how bad financial institutions' balance sheets were due to complicated, unregulated assets, with 'HOW BAD' and 'COMPLICATED, UNREGULATED' highlighted in green.
entity_library.New York Storefront: Real-world shot of a storefront with 'NEW YORK' in large metallic letters above the entrance, reflecting a city environment and possibly symbolizing the financial hub of the crisis.
